_session_note: Single long session. game.rs / ai.rs / ui.rs not yet updated to v4 types — first task next session.

overview.name: Ecosystem CCG
overview.target_platform: Termux (terminal) now, egui Android APK later
overview.status: active — core types and logic complete, game.rs/ai.rs/ui.rs need updating to v4 types
overview.repo_note: Code lives in Claude outputs, not in this repo. KB tracks design only.

architecture.separation_rule: ui.rs is the ONLY file with stdin/stdout. All other modules are pure logic. Replacing ui.rs with egui later ports the game to Android without touching game logic.

module_roles.types.rs: All data types, constants, trait system, card types, intention phase types. Zero I/O.
module_roles.cards.rs: All card definitions and deck builders. Zero I/O.
module_roles.biome.rs: World state: land slots, active biomes, placed organisms, fitness resolution, biome contests, world effect application. Zero I/O.
module_roles.player.rs: Three separate decks (organism, mutation, env), two hands (combined limit 5, env limit 3), discard/graveyard zones, elimination logic. Zero I/O.
module_roles.game.rs: Turn loop, human action API, win/loss conditions. No direct I/O — exposes state for ui.rs.
module_roles.ui.rs: All terminal input/output. Replace with egui when porting to Android.

intention_phase.reveals: target land + card pool + buffer count
intention_phase.player_can: change target, change buffer count, withdraw card entirely

turn_structure.draw_timing: draw at turn START, discard down to hand limit at turn END

hand_and_deck_rules.three_decks: organism deck, mutation deck, environment deck — separate draws

starting_hand.note: 8 combined cards dealt freely, player discards to 5 at end of first turn

hand_and_deck_rules.graveyard: played organisms, activated biomes, used modifiers — never recycles

thresholds.upgrade_if_best: >=2.0 (highest fitness in role group on this land)
thresholds.downgrade_if_worst: <1.0 (lowest fitness in role group on this land)
thresholds.critical_unmet_need: any single resource below 50% fulfillment — immediate downgrade override

fitness_system.calculation: temperature penalty + resource fulfillment + overcrowding + predation stress + flat trait modifiers
fitness_system.food_multiplier_on_producers: scales nutritional value output (herbivores get more per unit eaten) — does NOT affect producer's own fitness

population.role: multiplier on resource consumption and prey biomass provided to predators

resources.distribution_model: resources distributed each turn, NOT depleted — more organisms = smaller share per unit
resources.food_web: producers generate food biomass (scaled by own fitness). herbivores eat producers. carnivores eat prey by size. omnivores bridge both.

omnivore_space_split.mechanism: omnivores distribute territory pressure between herbivore and carnivore pools
omnivore_space_split.selection: pick split with highest predicted food+space fitness contribution
omnivore_space_split.prediction_scope: food availability and overcrowding only — other fitness factors held at current values

biome_health.role: modifier gate and world card damage target only
biome_health.does_not_affect: abiotic resource values (water, sunlight, water_level are fixed by biome card)
biome_health.regen: base regen from biome card + modifier regen bonuses
biome_health.max_health: base from biome card + modifier max_health_bonus
biome_health.modifier_gate: player env modifiers fall off when health drops below their min_health
biome_health.world_card_threshold: some world cards only apply to biomes below a health threshold — healthy biomes are immune

biome_system.land_slots: each land starts with a standard biome (stack 0)
biome_system.standard_biome_replacement: free placement, no buffer needed, no contest
biome_system.player_biome_contest: must provide buffer > current stack size to challenge
biome_system.simultaneous_collision: if multiple players target same standard land: randomly assign each to a different free standard land if available, else contest
biome_system.contest_resolution: highest stack wins uncontested at turn end; ties carry to next turn
biome_system.modifier_transfer: when biome replaced, player modifiers transfer if tag compatible and health >= min_health; negative world mods always transfer

types.BiomeDamage: immediate health damage, optional health_below threshold to apply
types.NegativeBiomeMod: attaches to biomes, subtracts resources; optional remove_above_health condition
types.FitnessPenalty: direct fitness hit to matching organisms

world_cards.win_condition: world deck exhausted = survivors win; last ecosystem standing in multiplayer

organism_design.biome_tag_policy: biome_tags only used for genuine biological impossibility (e.g. Kelp Forest requires aquatic). All others use empty tags — traits and resource needs self-regulate fitness.
organism_design.size: determines predation feasibility and territory consumption
organism_design.traits: conditional modifiers; mutations attach traits permanently to field organisms

next_session_tasks: Update game.rs to use new WorldEffect variants (BiomeDamage health_below, NegativeBiomeMod, GlobalTemporaryMod)
Update game.rs human_play_env to support intention phase
Update ai.rs to use DeclaredIntention before committing plays
Update ui.rs to show intention phase, display fitness values, show active world mods
Fix FitnessPenalty biome_tag matching (currently matches organism.biome_tags which may be empty — should match land biome tag)
cargo build and fix compile errors
